# Bayesian modeling and inference with Stan

Source materials for a one-day class taught by @bob-carpenter and
@mitzimorris at the [2026 Modern Modeling Methods
Conference](https://modeling.fordham.edu/2026-modern-modeling-methods-conference/modern-modeling-methods-2026-preliminary-program/)
at Fordham University.

## QR Code linking here

<p align="center">
  <img src="carpenter-slides/img/qr-code-github.png" alt="QR code for M3 tutorial" width="150">
</p>


## Bob Carpenter's slides

The top-level directory [`carpenter-slides`](/carpenter-slides)
contains Bob's slides.  You can make them in LaTeX as follows.

```sh
cd carpenter-slides
```

and then

```sh
pdflatex -output-directory=build slides.tex
```

## Stan Playground examples

Click on the example to go to the Stan Playground, where you will be
able to run and modify the example in the browser.

* [Warmup binomial simulation](https://stan-playground.flatironinstitute.org?project=lz-string:)

* [Binomial fit and
  prediction](https://stan-playground.flatironinstitute.org/?project=lz-string:-QGlJQxKh7jAiMhTM6GhQQBAAB5QIIAEVVHOdAG0ALqkIA)
  
* [Monte Carlo calculation of pi](https://stan-playground.flatironinstitute.org?project=lz-string:-AyMyLPCLiC2MhFbDaUUQAgCRNElGzuKoYzTIvZ0xQlB8AtcuyHNChVtX8ttAuMggMHLMUAFkHggYQmBgPhdGEYMwUEHKWE8clkHgBRA2K0MIHgfE1k8UhhGCAA5QxgAwCSnAiUglUipKKIgHhcCIYJdDaa8Gn4NRM16SkhoDNB8xQLhFr8c8Mhw4YjQpAten0RVXneNBPm+AAlAEgUeKAsFea5YD+G7spBR6bmuxhATe+7nleKgYHBVSuAAeSsPCEFAGF-DaQ8qIQcwQBhvw9HysBrAQOpkdhPxAeBuREY47HylQAIYCIZBxCoBAGIobynCgAQABEbgBGn4F7YdSCAA)  
  
* [Old faithful linear
  regression](https://stan-playground.flatironinstitute.org?project=lz-string:N4IgtgpgLghiBcooEsoBsIJAVQHYvQgBMQBfAGhAGdZcAxZDAYQHt8J8siZYACYADq5evZPgA8aFgHcIAJwC8ABgB8vAHIBuETt179OgPSHeAYl5Q5MMWIDmvFgCMqQkQDcIAYygs5AbXUAXV4AD20DCMjeYwsrG1x7TxY3GDlkHggXYV4Pb18A4IBPcKjSoxNLa1w7BwBXKCTILJExKEkZeWU1dQB9XAhpErLdGPMoTKgHZ1ccrx9--fZEQ7gAs190O4AzI+dKLX2feAA2ACcb5Eb8RS-F8AN4c89y-c9vzAu8YKgh8v1FTcwNAkDPxvcDtVQ7Cv2-FCkPgzDRVwzCILAoCwNFRDiMgzDvyI3RoLA8iEKomjdFFf8oNI3Q7zo3Q-1QjCn244jz1gsTOOA4iRJ0HcCLIq8oKknRz14+SZKYiSkOU+i5IvHSlNQgS1KMpiOPfDTby0+TrN4HdTJEX9LIvVSLwM3g73M989KfezkNQxi1NskRvNQxTONc3hf0inRv2i0UnJ-OKRGosDf08+9JJYnyPJwgqQOihSWOSkjStQ4rkoSqjgsA0KvPchz7JKpCGqS1D2pavz308y8Ioo5LmPQ4SMoa1jMJ3ey7x6myWNm3gP1yljPI6qCFrgsbYLyxbovPHadwW-aWLq8Dir6pqJqYsrTq4iijoWndboO1LwL6narp0X97OOkaoNuzz8NQo7TrvVbXpmiidtFR6htOz7AKOpr0pU0a-rIxKmqeravzvLHXsCkCAsShaUbIhrsqgnb+Mqlacfo0Gyqx9rbvGrK9qamqkM838Gs21Hcce17fsm4rTp3CmhoCnbKJAkHUKxgKKe62DTtl4ilcKyajuSvHSpmQI3xXQpj1PTC7wAOn6r9nwtw6wNt59tR27U7Ydi2lG-HbNwtiGLch3GLYY6nfefTyfe1BbHbDsCfaUZ3YP9jaLeTvmPYWn3+PDt2v1dp6Q9evOE9zu20MwvOo4t58vcT3WLe1GvA+fBa85jkupp223RUbzCI57viPf7nRLYbkOmrjsvdDj4vy7toeRDz92X0823rfN-2297qvJ+Hqvk6S7PHM81vPMttOs8T0GU53kRbeXsDXd-ZP78DzdN4H6uQ7rmHE897299jr7eeXlQ7Z1HonTKp964PytsnMO2c-bRR9vAmBR8YFr10BXX+N8QEfmPhbb6Idq5XzwYnOBM8B7dxDsnU6cd367zTmVD2MDg4wN-MA6eLsCH0LCvXChu9x7+34QvWBtceG8EXoHBqedgEjxoeI6OK8CHJ03JXK+d5hEgKUDgy2yUfZ+2-Aou24iI5UQ9uIy22c07nnESfROKD27ALsYHDul9E5wWoTo+uwDV6yKEZ3JO7iTHMPbsEwxUC672y-BPKBSgjFULIT44xUDtQWKrn4jRIdI6ALifg38XiD5LxwY-YpVtSn50Aak-BaDA7Q0Hl-TRmdE7ak0ZI9em4cG2yvjU9eHjAGxMThBMBidNxOKDu7aCXCbF5LGRghhnSCGaNtuw06MiQ6sMDsnAOmEu7oIziE9eXD2FcIqZssh5ybb+MAdFS26lVl200ZbVRbDHk53aV4rJBTXnZMuYQ1BwS35KKvg49eIKP4AteeEshtiykIJbqXbOTssl+OboMsZpydl21FAbI2q5MzHjJsuEA-YBimygg1b8pMSYUSytVV66snyvUpubcWysgpUSygdAKOsqJMr6u1TmWUCY-R+q9dhGU+riyZeLC6A10ZPgFahD6B09rRV5ttCqeE9o8qgrKgWxEsa-gNkGccIB4yPEKOiKgAAFQo04ICsHYPOEAyAwAnF8JMAAVlQNgQhXXurkJMXAtQ3WmhgDcXAJw--TAU0VB3hwijIKTw7wxBUFZKgCMKA2BUEXe2wkXYqDEjQKkGjZwrCXHkNodtamoBzmeJ4 * [Bradley-Terry model of business school preference](https://stan-playground.flatironinstitute.org?project=lz-string:N4IgtgpgLghiBcooEsoBsIJAVQHYvQgBMQBfAGhAGdZcAxZDAYQHt8J8siZYACYADq5evZPgA8aFgHcIAJwC8ABgB8vAHIBuETt179OgPSHeAYl5geAYwAWAVwAOVISLFRJM+crUApbQYCDYzNRKAgwZ2FeGDk5GABPAG11AF1RCSlZRQBGcl5HBy8fNWRkfxFggDNkORpQ8Jdo2ITktLcPLIVc-IdCxWLeACtB8t5gqggrNiJ6sEaYuKTU9PdMryU8gq9stXjRsZMWOygpyEjSIQcYmEgw2v5GqjswAH0oFheAL3kPgDdJ95yRI+NIwNAOGwwfaBALBGAAI0YqGQECovAAFFIAOa8FhEIhoqhWMEQACUQguuDAeIgaAeUTBEJgvAAfrxcCw5JY0OiNrwAKyk6Ew2EmBxyZCcxrxVm8eHyDl2NBoZAvbGodGMyGJUppAC00XB2uGKSFFRMKoA1rTkDYWHihI1ghAAI52ZC-XiVTkY4RiXjZeDqUm8JK4NJs+VyRXK1XqqCao0wHXIRLh-WGpmJYZplKmzQUkRCECUbiwBjMNhhTjwECCKICEDqRvwXgAJiUG0ajZ8Ld4ADZyN2QKU+4lGiJchOA0OoiIAMyz3RTue8AAsS50i+nK90bc3In30+3q93Og3O4PAqvR9Xt+XV7Pk6vF9PV-5j5vL8-l9-q5PD7Tq+e5XgBOj3luoE--a9EWrYDfVvQD5m-RDOh-d9w3NSD8O3cjSOozDH0HVdm1FVD93Xa1ePY9DN0tQF-2E8TW0nZDeNqZT+UYwTYM0yj6Nw591OI+53P7VTS3AyTbOs7JoMC3zIto5j7MPdLflA0LktM4r7205TKvC8l-Nc1LosK9r4v409LMtRt1m+WutX1SA8RNauXbeUFdtXvbKUuzobvpfFIgeyhDvO-7oW6D7jspchwfVYH7sB074k++Hkee970ehxHfsJ77rupyn07x2n3m55n6dh8nUdF1nXsZxXccl0nOc15XicN03Iel3n2f5+XjfF7HnfN-XBcVy3Xe8QPtcd2XdcT+PbeDyPvfdzPw9T0H-dz5PMeL031c98vVf10PW+r7vS+bwfC8r8fvDb9P7cX-ntUUiWIAwLgYLxFQyBUAACvEFYQKw7AawjjAA4TkUB2TPAcDKGAaJcAOCEMgEBYCLA8AcFIdAyB4QADooFoJYOAmBvA0FQEdLgcwYgiAQAAB64jkJQuQKCTg2FRLwO00heBEjtCwNAaIsgQF4FMShMxCHZCwVg-svBpDMOEPCd0aAiBiBxKUQwjVcBoARLSNECheDjhAAAGWmGwRseRGxfxiJ--e5PynlYMJbgTUVDP7KBRWsBh2i4E4PkIE-AjAPkkruXkNsWCPzRCpVQGlQgtj0vZA4JlcgWUoAwImJkWK8gAE4ADsPK8gwH5YK1F8g5Bqk8CK8laIDR0qEFql4wqMVmoNPq+JXSklEPQTaxJQhqhYlVTQ7RxCsFPHhHgqAVB0TOo-t8BQ6JFV5EFCioQbrRVYOuLgSZ6Ijm9KoVgrVnJ4QxGmauKheR9VXniFqhQiQTV0ryCa4VdVpyVDAFABQjYHElmnFMKQihGwZNpPCNAdgIDGOnJMbhnJa3UDCO2zt3aG2rmJE4ZAQb1KWDkNaWo06IAKAABxXhVLgCA0hkBEDaV0FVQgI2v2TWqmwG6Pl8ibQOxsWJFiWPPdu3dNhlBYLXbwc9NB4gYEHY6kAKK1WeugC8KhKAIl+qof+5NEwoDAdA5adR8oeGYg0TwvI1TYAoDYAoecfJISDolFiGwJC-1JsAzBr9KHpnPyTBicUEBKjyA4IEvI2I9R4gJBwi5ZI5mkeg28VA0rTEsAyRKH05Loi4BmPK-kABSFY8hfhgi9D6Th9o0mvIY683AgSMR9PJCR1FHqUCEZg+o+IRwE
